info.name: Approach2-SequentialFeedback-MultiContract-100K-30d-fix2
info.description:
APPROACH 2 — FIX 2: THREE-ITERATION CONVERGENCE

BUILDS ON FIX 1 (PP sign convention).
ADDS Iteration 3 to verify convergence.

Fix 1 showed:
  Iter 1: $66,151.71 redeemed (supply → $33,848.29) — model stops Mar 15
  Iter 2: $99,811.76 redeemed (supply → $188.24)    — model fires all 30 days
  Delta: $33,660.05 (50.88%) — NOT CONVERGED

Fix 2 hypothesis:
  Iter 2 already burned 99.8% of supply. Iter 3 should see similar
  reserves (Iter 2 cash ≈ Iter 3 cash since most supply is gone),
  producing nearly identical PP events → convergence.

PHASES:
  1-5: Same as Fix 1 (exogenous data, T-Bills, dynamic indexes, Iter 1)
  6-7: Same as Fix 1 (feedback Iter 1→2, run Iter 2)
  8:   NEW — Feedback Iter 2→3 (rebuild indexes with Iter 2 redemptions)
  9:   NEW — Behavioral models + Scenario Iter 3
  10:  NEW — Run Liability Iter 3
  11:  Convergence Iter 2 vs Iter 3 + Final Dashboard

Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running.

exec: console.log('Fix 1 result: Iter1=$66,152 vs Iter2=$99,812 → 50.9% delta');
console.log('Fix 2 adds Iteration 3 to verify convergence.');

item.name: 1.2 Create minimal scenario for T-Bill run

exec: console.log('PHASE 2: T-BILL ONLY SIMULATION — ACTUAL EVENTS');
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
console.log('  ' + cid + ': ' + e.time + ' ' + e.type + ' payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2));
tbillContracts[cid] = { events: events, mdEvent: mdEvent, iedEvent: iedEvent, params: contractParams[cid] || null };
for(var d = new Date(startDate); d <= endDate; d.setDate(d.getDate()+1)){
var matNote = dd.maturedToday ? ' ← ' + dd.maturedToday.cid + ' MD +$' + dd.maturedToday.payoff.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + dd.date + ' | Cash=$' + dd.cash.toFixed(2) + ' | TBillMV=$' + dd.tbillMV.toFixed(2) + ' | Total=$' + dd.totalReserves.toFixed(2) + matNote);
console.log('✅ Daily data stored for Phase 3.');
var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.tbillMV}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_TBILL_MV_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TBILL_MV', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
pm.test('SC_TBILL_MV loaded', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_TBILL_MV_DYN_I1'); });
var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.cash}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_CASH_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_CASH_RESERVE', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
pm.test('SC_CASH I1 loaded', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_CASH_DYN_I1 (optimistic, no redemptions)'); });
var indexData = daily.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.totalReserves}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_RESERVES_DYN_I1', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TOTAL_RESERVES', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
pm.test('SC_RESERVES I1 loaded', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_RESERVES_DYN_I1'); });
pm.test('BR Iter 1', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ br_seq_100k_i1'); });
pm.test('Scenario I1', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ sc_seq_iter1_100k'); });
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
var nomVal = (e.nominalValue !== undefined && e.nominalValue !== null) ? e.nominalValue : null;
ppEvents.push({ time: e.time, type: e.type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal });
var nomStr = pp.nominalValue !== null ? ' remaining=$' + pp.nominalValue.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + pp.time + ' PP payoff=$' + pp.payoff.toFixed(2) + nomStr);
// Rebuild cash: iter0 cash - cumulative Iter 1 positive PP payoffs
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_CASH_DYN_I2', marketObjectCode: 'SC_CASH_RESERVE', base: 1.0, data: correctedData };
return { date: dd.date, time: dd.time, cash: correctedData[idx].value, tbillMV: dd.tbillMV, totalReserves: correctedData[idx].value + dd.tbillMV };
console.log('Phase 6: Iter 2 cash index — ' + Object.keys(redemptionsByDate).length + ' redemption days, cumulative=$' + cumulativeRedemptions.toFixed(2));
pm.test('SC_CASH I2', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_CASH_DYN_I2 (Iter 1 redemptions subtracted)'); });
var indexData = corrected.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.totalReserves}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_RESERVES_DYN_I2', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TOTAL_RESERVES', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
pm.test('SC_RESERVES I2', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_RESERVES_DYN_I2'); });
pm.test('BR Iter 2', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ br_seq_100k_i2'); });
pm.test('Scenario I2', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ sc_seq_iter2_100k'); });
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
var nomVal = (e.nominalValue !== undefined && e.nominalValue !== null) ? e.nominalValue : null;
iter2PP.push({time: e.time, type: e.type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal});
var nomStr = pp.nominalValue !== null ? ' remaining=$' + pp.nominalValue.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + pp.time + ' PP payoff=$' + pp.payoff.toFixed(2) + nomStr);
// Rebuild cash: iter0 cash - cumulative Iter 2 positive PP payoffs
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_CASH_DYN_I3', marketObjectCode: 'SC_CASH_RESERVE', base: 1.0, data: correctedData };
return { date: dd.date, time: dd.time, cash: correctedData[idx].value, tbillMV: dd.tbillMV, totalReserves: correctedData[idx].value + dd.tbillMV };
pm.test('SC_CASH I3', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_CASH_DYN_I3 (Iter 2 redemptions subtracted)'); });
var indexData = corrected.map(function(dd){ return {time: dd.time, value: dd.totalReserves}; });
var body = { riskFactorID: 'SC_RESERVES_DYN_I3', marketObjectCode: 'SC_TOTAL_RESERVES', base: 1.0, data: indexData };
pm.test('SC_RESERVES I3', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ SC_RESERVES_DYN_I3'); });
pm.test('BR Iter 3', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ br_seq_100k_i3'); });
pm.test('Scenario I3', function(){ pm.response.to.have.status(200); console.log('✅ sc_seq_iter3_100k'); });
var payoff = (e.payoff !== undefined && e.payoff !== null) ? e.payoff : 0;
var nomVal = (e.nominalValue !== undefined && e.nominalValue !== null) ? e.nominalValue : null;
iter3PP.push({time: e.time, type: e.type, payoff: payoff, nominalValue: nomVal});
var nomStr = pp.nominalValue !== null ? ' remaining=$' + pp.nominalValue.toFixed(2) : '';
console.log('  ' + pp.time + ' PP payoff=$' + pp.payoff.toFixed(2) + nomStr);
console.log('✅ Stored for Phase 11 convergence check.');
iter2PP.forEach(function(pp){ var dk = pp.time.substring(0,10); i2ByDate[dk] = (i2ByDate[dk] || 0) + pp.payoff; });
iter3PP.forEach(function(pp){ var dk = pp.time.substring(0,10); i3ByDate[dk] = (i3ByDate[dk] || 0) + pp.payoff; });
console.log('   The feedback loop has stabilized after 3 iterations.');
console.log('   Iter 3 is the BEST ESTIMATE of protocol behavior under stress.');
console.log('PHASE 11.2: FINAL PORTFOLIO DASHBOARD (ITER 3 — BEST ESTIMATE)');
// Build redemptions by date from Iter 3
console.log('DATE         | CASH        | T-BILLS     | TOTAL RES   | SUPPLY      | BACKING  | LIQUIDITY | ACE  ');
console.log('🚫 Stress period: ' + stressDates[0] + ' to ' + stressDates[stressDates.length-1] + ' (' + stressDates.length + ' days)');
console.log('  Iter 1: optimistic (no feedback)  → model stops Mar 15');
console.log('  Iter 2: corrected (Iter 1 drain)  → model fires all 30 days');
console.log('  Iter 3: corrected (Iter 2 drain)  → BEST ESTIMATE');
console.log('  With 6% initial liquidity and 14-day first maturity gap,');
console.log('  the protocol cannot survive the stress scenario.');
console.log('  The iterative feedback reveals a death spiral where');
console.log('  redemptions drain all cash, causing more redemptions.');
